windows.old_description: Packing the candles into boxes for shipping.
windows.embed_text_v2: Packaging small-business orders, trimming pink branded JOOLIE tissue paper with a black guillotine paper cutter, then rows of empty cream cardboard shipping boxes on wood floor, white pillar candles, scissors
windows.summary_v2: Overhead packaging footage of pink branded 'JOOLIE' tissue wraps being trimmed, dissolving to rows of empty cream shipping boxes assembled on the floor.

tags_v2.action: trimming branded tissue paper and arranging shipping boxes
tags_v2.setting: home packing area, wooden table and floor

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a wooden table strewn with dozens of folded pink tissue-paper wraps printed with an oval 'JOOLIE' logo; at upper left sit a stack of white pillar candles, scissors and a marker, with a black TV remote at right.

A small black tabletop guillotine paper trimmer is lowered into the centre of the frame over the pile of pink JOOLIE-printed tissue sheets, its cutting arm raised, surrounded by the same scattered pink wraps.
Close tilted view of the black paper trimmer resting on the pink tissue sheets, cutting blade up; the oval 'JOOLIE' stamp is clearly legible on the surrounding pink papers.
The trimmer has moved off-frame; camera looks across the heaped pink 'JOOLIE' tissue wraps fanned over the wood table, a yellow craft knife visible at left edge.
Dissolve transition: the pink tissue pile fades into rows of upright cream cardboard shipping boxes with white interior flaps standing open, the two images briefly overlaid.
Overhead of many empty cream/white folding cartons stood in tight rows on a wood-laminate floor, lids open showing white liners, decorative striped tape along their bases.
Camera pans right across the same grid of open cream gift boxes on the wooden floor, revealing more empty boxes and bare laminate flooring to the right.
Continued pan over the rows of assembled cream boxes with blue-and-white striped seams, now lower and angled, large expanse of wood floor filling the right of the frame.
